calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Oscar Vallejos, moving party and defendant appeared in propria persona. Mark Bridges, Esq., (650) 583-5500, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party.

After argument the Court adopted the tentative decision as the order of the court: defendant Oscar Vallejos' demurrer to complaint is SUSTAINED without leave to amend for failure to strictly comply with 37.9 (B)(C)(4). Hon. James J. McBride. Reporter: Eric Throne CSR #7855 (jjm/cl)

MOTION To Strike Certain Portions Of The Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Oscar Vallejos, moving party and defendant appeared in propria persona. Mark Bridges, Esq., (650) 583-5500, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party.

After argument the Court adopted the tentative decision as the order of the court: defendant Oscar Vallejos' motion to strike in MOOT. Hon. James J. McBride. Reporter: Eric Throne CSR #7855 (jjm/cl)
